events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana to Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo. All flights and hotels booked. Now in activity planning and shopping phase, including buying 4 pairs of eyeglasses.
events.hook: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping and validate insurance/prescription requirements before departure.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
